samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in input is constant during the period when data_en=1. So, if data_en=1 for 3 or more clk_a cycles, then the data_in value can be synchronized and held during clk_b cycles. The clk_a clock domain is responsible for data_in and data_en, and the clk_b clock domain is responsible for the dataout output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input enable.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" type="enum">
            <enum_value id="ZERO" value="3'b000">Zero state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="ONE" value="3'b001">One state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="TWO" value="3'b010">Two state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="THREE" value="3'b011">Three state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="FOUR" value="3'b100">Four state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="FIVE" value="3'b101">Five state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="SIX" value="3'b110">Six state.</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="SEVEN" value="3'b111">Seven state.</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <enum_value id="ZERO" value="3'b000"/>
        <enum_value id="ONE" value="3'b001"/>
        <enum_value id="TWO" value="3'b010"/>
        <enum_value id="THREE" value="3'b011"/>
        <enum_value id="FOUR" value="3'b100"/>
        <enum_value id="FIVE" value="3'b101"/>
        <enum_value id="SIX" value="3'b110"/>
        <enum_value id="SEVEN" value="3'b111"/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum_value id="ZERO" value="3'b000"/>
        <enum_value id="ONE" value="3'b001"/>
        <enum_value id="TWO" value="3'b010"/>
        <enum_value id="THREE" value="3'b011"/>
        <enum_value id="FOUR" value="3'b100"/>
        <enum_value id="FIVE" value="3'b101"/>
        <enum_value id="SIX" value="3'b110"/>
        <enum_value id="SEVEN" value="3'b111"/>
    </implementation>
</module>
